---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new step
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What is missing or could be clearer in the workshop?

## Proposed change

Describe the new step, option, or behavior. If it is a new step, note which tool
it would use and whether it signs anything.

## Notes

- Must remain configurable (no hardcoded identities/keys/labels).
- User-facing text must be bilingual (pt/es) via the `t` helper.
